name: awesome-opensource-ai
description: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.

name: awesome-openclaw
description: A curated list of the best OpenClaw resources: official projects, skills, plugins, dashboards, deployment tooling, memory systems, and guides.

name: forge-film
description: Multi-model DAG-driven parallel AI film generation — parallel speedup scales with scene independence; Generate film scenes simultaneously instead of one by one;  "把影视生成的执行图从拓扑序变成关键路径最优调度" ; 唯一把场景叙事依赖建模为 DAG、以 CPM    算法驱动并行调度的影视生成引擎

name: AQBot
description: 轻量级高性能跨平台 AI 聊天+AI网关桌面客户端

name: figma-mcp-go
description: Figma MCP for free users — no rate limits, full read/write, text to designs, designs to code

name: ai-localbase
description: 一个本地优先的AI知识库系统（RAG），用于把本地文档接入辅导搜索与大模型对话流程。目前支持md、txt、pdf（文本）类型

name: glance
description: AI-powered browser automation MCP server for Claude Code. Navigate, click, screenshot, test — all from your terminal.

name: Wechat-Claude-bot
description: 通过微信远程操控 Claude Code CLI，在手机上写代码、执行命令、管理项目 | Control Claude Code from WeChat

name: anvil
description: IDE for parallel agent work. Create worktrees in one click. Share plans between agents. Execute with parallelism + isolation.
